title: WPC Fluted Panel Series
shortDescription: Transform your space with Goals Floors - India's most advanced 9mm WPC fluted panels featuring premium textures and designer finishes.
longDescription:
Elevate your interior design with the Goals Floors WPC Fluted Panel collection. Our 9mm series is engineered for both beauty and structural longevity. Unlike traditional wall coverings, Goals Floors panels offer a high-density composite core that is 100% moisture-proof and termite-resistant.

Whether you are designing a high-end residential TV wall, a luxury bedroom accent, or a premium corporate reception area, our three distinct series—Wood, Metallic, and Designer—provide the perfect aesthetic for modern architectural standards. Each panel is factory-calibrated to 2950mm x 300mm for seamless, edge-to-edge installation with a professional tongue-and-groove interlocking system.

features.title: Elite 9mm Calibration
features.description: Precisely calibrated 9mm thickness provides the perfect balance of structural rigidity and lightweight handling for vertical installations.

features.title: 100% Moisture Proof
features.description: Zero water absorption ensures your walls remain free from dampness, swelling, or decay in all weather conditions.

features.title: Termite & Borer Shield
features.description: Natural wood aesthetics combined with full-scale protection against wood-boring insects and pests.

features.title: Commercial Impact Grade
features.description: High-density WPC core resists scratches and impacts, making it ideal for high-traffic luxury corridors and lobbies.

features.title: Seamless Interlock
features.description: Advanced tongue-and-groove profile allows for rapid installation while completely concealing joints and fixings.

features.title: Maintenance Free
features.description: Pre-finished surfaces with anti-scratch coating require no painting or polishing, saving time and long-term costs.

installation: Goals Floors panels are designed for extremely fast installation. They can be mounted directly onto leveled surfaces using heavy-duty PU adhesives (3M/Standard Grade) and secured with hidden brad nails through the interlocking flange. Panels can be standard-cut at 90° for edge-to-edge floor-to-ceiling coverage.
maintenance: Simply dust with a regular microfiber cloth or vacuum with a soft brush attachment. For minor marks, wipe with a damp (not wet) cloth. The premium UV-protected finish requires zero active maintenance.

faqs.question: Why should I choose Cobra WPC panels over cheaper PVC panels?
faqs.answer: Cobra WPC panels offer superior structural density. Cheap PVC is hollow, brittle, and easily cracks upon impact. Cobra WPC looks like authentic wood, handles impacts better, and lasts significantly longer without looking 'plasticky'.

faqs.question: Can the Cobra Fluted Panels be used for TV background walls?
faqs.answer: Yes, this is one of their most popular applications. The fluted design creates a stunning, luxurious backdrop for modern TVs and hides unsightly wiring perfectly behind the panel framework.

faqs.question: Are these panels safe for bedrooms and living rooms?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. The Cobra series is manufactured using eco-friendly materials and is free from harmful VOC emissions, making it completely safe and hygienic for indoor residential use.

faqs.question: Do I need to paint or polish these panels after installation?
faqs.answer: No. The Cobra WPC Fluted Panels are pre-finished with high-quality, scratch-resistant wooden textures. They are ready-to-use right out of the box, saving you time and messy paint jobs on site.

faqs.question: What is the difference between the 12mm Curve and 12mm Wave profiles?
faqs.answer: The 'Curve' profile features deep, semi-circular flutes for a bold, traditional louvered look, while the 'Wave' profile has softer, shallower undulations for a more subtle and modern aesthetic. Both are highly popular.

faqs.question: Can these panels be installed directly on a damp wall?
faqs.answer: While the WPC material itself is 100% waterproof, the adhesive used to stick them needs a dry surface. For actively damp walls, we recommend applying a waterproofing chemical or creating a thin aluminum/plywood grid first.

faqs.question: Do you provide installation accessories like matching edge trims?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors provides a complete ecosystem. We stock matching WPC L-profiles, U-trims, and fastener clips in the same Cobra shades to ensure your project has a flawless, professional finish.

faqs.question: How do you clean the dust that settles in the flutes/grooves?
faqs.answer: Maintenance is very simple. You can use a standard feather duster, a dry microfiber cloth, or a vacuum cleaner with a soft brush nozzle to quickly remove any dust that settles in the grooves.

faqs.question: Are these panels suitable for commercial high-traffic areas?
faqs.answer: Yes. For commercial spaces like hotel lobbies or office corridors, we recommend our thicker 24mm or 28mm Cobra panels. They offer excellent impact resistance against luggage, carts, or heavy foot traffic.

faqs.question: Do you supply the Cobra series in bulk to interior contractors in Noida and Delhi?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is the preferred project supplier for interior designers and contractors across Delhi NCR. We offer dedicated B2B pricing and rapid site-delivery for bulk project orders.

installationSteps.title: Surface Calibration
points: Clinically clean and free from dust/grease
installationSteps.tip: For best results, install over a thin plywood base or directly onto painted/plastered walls.

installationSteps.title: Precision Cutting
points: Cut panels at a perfect 90° using a fine-tooth saw
Deburr edges for a seamless joint

installationSteps.title: Adhesion Matrix
points: Apply PU adhesive in a 'caterpillar' track pattern
Keep adhesive 25mm away from all edges
installationSteps.tip: Excessive glue can bleed into the grooves; use calibrated nozzles.

installationSteps.title: Locking & Finalization
points: Slide the male tongue into the female groove
Press firmly across the entire panel surface
Secure the interlocking lip with hidden brad nails
